originalTitle: Live Dev - PufferLib is Fixing Reinforcement Learning
title: Debugging PSGD Optimizer Integration and Running Hyperparameter Sweeps in PufferLib
summary: Worked on integrating the PSGD optimizer into PufferLib, debugging the closure API from a pull request. Ran hyperparameter sweeps on neural MMO and compared PSGD with the Muon optimizer, noting sensitivity and performance plateaus.
